case_title: BASIL MUFARREH et al VS. NILA ARAGO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DANIEL DEAN. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE/ NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUFARREH, BASIL MUFARREH, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARAGO, NILA $1,898.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,983.00, JUDGMENT OF MAY 9, 2008 IS AMENDED TO PROVIDE FOR INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS AS FOLLOWS: PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $200.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JUL-01-2008 AND ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-14-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARAGO, NILA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,670.00 FILED BY MUFARREH, BASIL MUFARREH, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT ARAGO, NILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MUFARREH, BASIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUFARREH, BASIL MUFARREH, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARAGO, NILA $1,898.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,983.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ARAGO, NILA HEARING SET FOR JUN-26-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2008 - AMENDED JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
